title: Black Sea, 2024
briefing: DEFCON 4. Sevastopol-based Russian naval assets are moving. NATO air policing runs out of Romania and Bulgaria track the activity. A mishap over the Bosporus would draw every capital in.
gdelt_query: "Black Sea" OR Sevastopol OR Romania OR Bulgaria navy
opening_message: WOPR online. Theater: Black Sea. Awaiting strategic command.

win_conditions.disarm: Stand down without losing a ship. DEFCON <= 3, both sides deescalating.
win_conditions.mutual_assured_destruction: Both sides launch within 2 turns of each other.
